CE1.justification: Acted directly on the request, asked nothing of the user, and required no context reconstruction.

CE2.justification: Two short sentences naming the move, the status, and the standup-readiness — no preamble, no restatement, no closing summary.

CE3.justification: Said where (decisions.md) and why (status accepted, provenance marker added) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single clean commit to decisions.md with a provenance marker; partial interruption would leave no orphans in tmp/ or the log.
